positive: A symmetrical, intricate celestial mandala design featuring stylized constellations, abstract nebula clouds, and geometric lunar phases. The primary color palette should be deep midnight blue, rich cosmic violet, shimmering gold accents, and brilliant sapphire blue. The design must maintain strong, clean silhouettes with defined lines, suitable for a central chest print. The composition must be perfectly centered and radially symmetrical. Cinematic cosmic lighting, highly detailed etching style, vector art quality, suitable for screen printing, isolated on a solid dark background.
negative: blurry, artifact, grain, text, watermark, low detail, cartoon, messy, imperfect lines, extra limbs, bad anatomy, writing, logos, trademarks
